title: HTTP transport implementation for MCP protocol with streaming support
purpose: Provides a streamable HTTP transport for Model Context Protocol that handles both client-to-server POST requests and server-to-client GET streaming responses.
module_context: Exports a StreamableHttpTransport class that implements the Transport interface for MCP protocol version 2025-03-26, supporting session management, message parsing, response handling, and SSE streaming for server notifications.

steps.content: Check if the transport session is closed and return an error response if so.
Parse the request body as text and then as JSON.
Validate the parsed messages against the JSON-RPC schema and ensure they are valid.
If the messages contain only notifications or responses, deliver them and return a 202 status.
If the messages contain requests, set up a promise to wait for responses with configurable timeout.
Deliver all parsed messages to the MCP server via the onmessage handler.
Await the response from the server and format it as a JSON-RPC response.
Return the formatted response with appropriate headers.
Check if the transport session is closed and return an error response if so.
Create a new ReadableStream with a controller to manage server-side events.
Store the stream controller for later use in sending messages.
Return a Response with the stream and appropriate headers for SSE.
Close the transport session.
Return a 204 No Content response indicating successful termination.
Check if the transport session is closed and throw an error if so.
If there is a pending response, add the message to it.
IF the message is a response (has result or error), resolve the pending response.
ELSE if there is no pending response, send the message via the SSE stream if available.
Perform no operation as HTTP transport does not require explicit start.
Mark the transport session as closed if it isn't already.
Resolve any pending response with the messages collected so far.
Close the SSE stream controller if one exists.
Trigger the onclose handler to notify listeners of the session termination.
